ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance measure (e.g., Citizens rating services as good or better) */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* Type of performance measure (e.g., Crime, Service, Safety) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the performance measure */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., percentage, number per 1,000 residents) */,
  "fy_2009_10_actual" REAL /* Actual value for FY 2009-10 */,
  "fy_2010_11_actual" REAL /* Actual value for FY 2010-11 */,
  "fy_2011_12_projected" REAL /* Projected value for FY 2011-12 */,
  "fy_2012_13_target" REAL /* Target value for FY 2012-13 */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the record creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_data" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the performance measures table */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., Part 1 person crime) */,
  "date_occurred" TEXT /* Date the crime occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the crime */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the crime (e.g., Open, Closed, Cleared) */,
  "cleared_by" TEXT /* Method by which the crime was cleared (e.g., Arrest, Exceptional Clearance) */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer handling the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citizen_satisfaction" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the performance measures table */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was conducted */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of municipal service (e.g., Parks, Police, Fire) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the citizen (e.g., 1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Citizen comments or feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., Admin, Staff) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User email */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each performance measure
Name of the performance measure (e.g., Citizens rating services as good or better)
Type of performance measure (e.g., Crime, Service, Safety)
Detailed description of the performance measure
Unit of measurement (e.g., percentage, number per 1,000 residents)
User ID who last updated the record
User ID who created the record
Foreign key linking to the performance measures table
Type of crime (e.g., Part 1 person crime)
Status of the crime (e.g., Open, Closed, Cleared)
Method by which the crime was cleared (e.g., Arrest, Exceptional Clearance)
ID of the officer handling the case
Foreign key linking to the performance measures table
Type of municipal service (e.g., Parks, Police, Fire)
Rating given by the citizen (e.g., 1-5 scale)
